resources.string:
Selected server
Host name: %1$s
IP: %2$s
Ping: %3$s ms
Speed: %4$s Mbps
Sessions: %5$d
Uptime: %6$s
Filter: %7$s
Auto quality: %8$s
Google Play will show the final local price before purchase.

Automatic mode: one-tap VPN connection by country.

Pro adds exact server selection, sorting by speed, ping, or score, quality filtering, manual switching, and OVPN profile export.

%1$s
Purchases are not available right now.\n\nIf this app was installed from Google Play, try again in a moment or use Restore purchase.
Google Play could not check your purchase right now. Please try again in a moment.
Google Play reports that the Pro purchase is still pending. Server selection will unlock after the purchase completes.
Server selection is unlocked on this device.
No Pro purchase was found for this Google Play account.
The Pro product is not active in Google Play yet. Please try again after the store listing is fully set up.
Google Play is connecting. Please try Restore again in a moment.
How your VPN data is handled

To provide the VPN, Noren VPN uses Android VpnService and sends this device's network traffic through a public VPN Gate volunteer server until you disconnect.

VPN Gate states that its connection logs include connection times, your source IP address and hostname, the selected VPN server, protocol and client details, traffic totals and errors, and destination HTTP/HTTPS hostnames, IP addresses, and port numbers. Its central logs are kept for at least three months. Each volunteer server also keeps TCP/IP packet headers for at least two weeks. Logs may be disclosed when legally authorized.

We do not operate those servers or receive their logs. We use the traffic only to provide the VPN; VPN Gate and the volunteer operator handle the logged data. Choose Agree and continue only if you consent.

Noren VPN uses Android VpnService to route this device's network traffic through an encrypted OpenVPN tunnel to a public VPN Gate volunteer server. We do not operate those servers or receive their logs.

VPN Gate states that its central connection logs include connection times, source IP address and hostname, selected server, protocol and client details, traffic totals and errors, and destination HTTP/HTTPS hostnames, IP addresses, and ports. Those logs are kept for at least three months. Volunteer servers keep TCP/IP packet headers for at least two weeks. Legally authorized disclosures may occur.

The app has no account, ads, or analytics. It stores settings, server cache, purchase unlock state, and optional exported OVPN profiles locally. Public IP services receive normal request metadata when the app checks the connected IP. Google Play handles optional Pro purchases.

The tunnel protects traffic only to the VPN endpoint. Security after that endpoint depends on each destination service, and anonymity, availability, and access are not guaranteed.

Host name: %1$s
IP: %2$s
Ping: %3$s ms
Speed: %4$s Mbps
Uptime: %5$s
Auto quality: %6$s

Press Connect to request Android VPN permission and start the OpenVPN connection inside this app.

File created

File: %1$s
Location: %2$s

Press Open in OpenVPN to go to the import screen. If nothing happens, open Import Profile → File → Downloads/NorenVPN in OpenVPN for Android.
This backup path is used only when the built-in connection fails. Normally the app requests Android VPN permission and starts its own OpenVPN service.
Try another country or refresh the server list.
Pick a server from the list, then try again.
The server list is still loading. Please try Start VPN again in a moment.
No %1$s servers are available right now.\n\nChoose another country or refresh the server list, then try again.
